meta.title: Faleague The Football Hub
meta.description: World Cup live, FPL tools, global football news, and AI — your football hub in one place.

footer.legal: Unofficial · not affiliated with the Premier League or FPL.

home.subtitle: World Cup live, Premier League fantasy, global news, and an AI that reads the data — one hub for everything football.
home.todayEmpty: Live updates appear here as fixtures and news sync.
home.yourFootballGuestBody: Create a free account to get World Cup and FPL news matched to your teams in your inbox.
home.yourFootballEmpty: No notifications yet — check back after the next sync.
home.wcDescription: Fixtures, group tables, and top scorers from the World Cup fantasy pool.
home.wcEmpty: World Cup data will appear when fixtures are synced.
home.newsDescription: Headlines from outlets worldwide — tap through to read on the publisher's site.
home.newsEmpty: No headlines cached yet — try the full news page.
home.fplDescription: Connect your team for squad tools, planner, and dashboard.
home.entryHint: Entry ID from your Points page on fantasy.premierleague.com
home.exploreChatBody: Captaincy, transfers, and squad questions with live FPL & WC data.
home.exploreMiniBody: Pick five players for the gameweek — quick daily fantasy.
home.explorePlayersBody: Search any asset — stats, xP outlook, and peer radar.
home.exploreScoutingBody: Hidden gems and differential picks for the tournament.
home.exploreMatchesBody: Scores, scorers, summaries, and listen-aloud commentary.
home.feature1Body: Answers tied to the FPL API — form, fixtures, FDR, xG.
home.feature2Body: Optimizer on your squad, plus plain-English explanation.
home.feature3Body: Entry ID → XI, bank, chips — advice in context.
home.playersCardBody: Search any asset — FPL stats, xP outlook, and a radar vs same-position peers.

dashboardIndex.title: Your FPL dashboard
dashboardIndex.description: Enter your FPL Entry ID to see squad stats for your team.

managerIndex.title: FPL performance
managerIndex.description: Enter your FPL Entry ID to see overall rank, history, and benchmark comparisons (live FPL API).

managerPage.subtitle: {manager} · FPL current GW {gw}
managerPage.error403: The official FPL API may block this server (e.g. from a cloud region). Try again later or set FPL_FETCH_USER_AGENT in the server environment.
managerPage.gwHistoryRankUp: Overall rank improved vs previous gameweek
managerPage.gwHistoryRankDown: Overall rank dropped vs previous gameweek
managerPage.chartOrHint: Lower overall rank is better (better toward the top). Line uses your published history for each gameweek.
managerPage.chartOrEmpty: No gameweek history yet for this season.
managerPage.chartPctHint: FPL “percentile rank” for each gameweek (higher = better).
managerPage.chartPtsHint: Your GW points vs global average and two sample managers from the Overall league (not a full top-10K average).
managerPage.benchmarkNote: The global line is the official average score for that gameweek. The amber and purple lines are single managers near ~10k and ~100k overall rank in the public Overall league table — useful as a rough benchmark, not a cohort mean.
managerPage.benchmarkSamples: Sample entries: ~10k band OR ≈{r10} (entry {id10}), ~100k band OR ≈{r100} (entry {id100}).
managerPage.footerNote: Data is read from the public FPL API. Rank and averages update after the game processes each gameweek.

chat.title: FPL analyst
chat.description: Live FPL data. Add your Entry ID on Home for squad-specific answers.

fhBanner.plannerShowTempFh: Showing your temporary Free Hit 15 (GW{picksGw}). To plan with the squad you revert to after the Free Hit, open the planner without ?squad=freehit.
fhBanner.plannerUsingRevert: Using your GW{longGw} squad (revert team after Free Hit). Add ?squad=freehit to the URL to see the Free Hit 15.
fhBanner.plannerMissingRevert: Free Hit is active on GW{picksGw}. The pitch below is your temporary 15. We could not load your revert squad from GW{prevGw}. Try again with ?refresh=1 or after the player DB sync job runs.
fhBanner.dashboardShowTempFh: Showing your temporary Free Hit 15 (GW{picksGw}). The dashboard defaults to your revert squad after the chip.
fhBanner.dashboardUsingRevert: Using your GW{longGw} squad (reverts after this Free Hit). Use the link below to view the temporary Free Hit 15.
fhBanner.dashboardMissingRevert: Free Hit is active on GW{picksGw}. Below is your temporary 15. We could not load your revert squad from GW{prevGw}. Try ?refresh=1 or after player DB sync.

dashboard.errorFpl403Hint: The official FPL API returned “forbidden” for this server. That often happens from cloud datacenters (e.g. Vercel). Try again later, deploy from another region, or set FPL_FETCH_USER_AGENT in the server env to a current desktop Chrome user-agent string.
dashboard.staleBody: next-GW picks can be hidden until the deadline. FH/WC/BB and pending transfers may not show yet. Below = last confirmed (GW{gw}).
dashboard.fixturesHint: FDR: green easy · red hard. Yellow ring = DGW.
dashboard.squadSubRevert: GW{longGw} revert squad · FPL snapshot GW{picksGw} ·
dashboard.heatmapLegendHint: Colours = xP/fixture. Yellow ring = 2+ games that GW (DGW).

plannerApp.title: Scenario planner
plannerApp.subtitleSuffix: Transfers & XI vs budget/FPL rules · xP projection · read-only.
plannerApp.refreshSquadTitle: Reload your 15 from the official FPL API (after transfers). Bypasses the short server cache.
plannerApp.bestXiTitle: XI with max total xP (last Refresh xP).
plannerApp.xiBenchTitle: Turn on, then tap a starter and a bench player (either order) on the planning pitch or table. Formation must stay valid. Scenario XI xP uses existing Refresh xP data and updates as soon as you swap.
plannerApp.hintPitchXiSuffix: (XI↔bench): two taps on the right. Else:
plannerApp.errPickOneStarterBench: Pick one starter and one bench player.
plannerApp.errNoValidXi: No valid XI from current xP.
plannerApp.pitchYourFplCaption: FPL squad when you opened this page.
plannerApp.pitchCardNextGwXpTitle: Model xP for GW{gw} (first GW in your horizon). Starter captain ×2 on the chip.
plannerApp.swapClubCap: Can't add this player: your squad would have more than 3 players from {club}.
plannerApp.valXiSum: XI formation does not add up to 11 players.
plannerApp.inspectFixtureHint: xP uses the same projection as Refresh xP (expected minutes, fixtures, form blend).
plannerApp.hintTapProfile: Tap any player card for profile & fixture outlook.
plannerApp.topsHint: Top 3 by projected xP per position for the same window as Refresh xP (same engine as the pitch).
plannerApp.topsXpPitchAlign: Values match pitch cards: next-GW xP for GW{from}.
plannerApp.topsXpHorizonAlign: Values are horizon totals (sum of all GWs in the window).
plannerApp.topsEmpty: Refresh xP to load league top xP by position for this horizon.

playerPage.description: {team} · {pos} · Model xP for GW{gw1}–{gw2} (current FPL GW {gw0}).
playerPage.dataSourceFpl: FPL official — season totals, ICT, status, and prices from the live game data sync.
playerPage.dataSourceModel: FALEAGUE model — horizon xP and expected minutes use the same engine as the planner.
playerPage.radarSubtitle: Form is the official FPL form figure vs peers. Other axes are season per-90 rates (÷ minutes × 90), each 0–100 vs the 95th percentile in the same position (min. minutes > 0). DefCon uses FPL defensive contribution.
playerPage.radarCaption: Shape vs strong peers: form plus per-90 output (goals, assists, xG, xA, defensive contribution) scaled to your position.
playerPage.radarCompareHint: Goals, assists, xG, xA, and DefCon are computed per 90 from season totals; each player is scored vs their own position’s p95.
playerPage.radarCompareNoHits: No other players match that search.
playerPage.radarComparePosNote: Different positions use different peer scales — good for shape, less for head-to-head raw stats.
playerPage.fixtureHint: Same projection engine as the planner’s Refresh xP (minutes, fixtures, rolling blend).

playerGwChart.empty: No recent gameweek rows in the database yet — run the FPL sync job.
playerGwChart.footnote: Per gameweek from the synced live feed. “Form (3GW Ø pts)” is the average FPL points over that GW and the two before it (within the bars shown).

playersIndex.title: Player profiles
playersIndex.description: Search any FPL asset by name. Opens a profile with official FPL stats, our xP model, and a peer radar chart.
playersIndex.searchHint: Uses the same player list as the planner transfer search.

chatUi.emptyLead: FPL questions — fixtures, form, captaincy, transfers.
chatUi.emptyNoEntry: Add Entry ID on Home for your XI.
chatUi.streamInterrupted: The reply stream was interrupted (network or timeout). Try again.

planner.errorFpl403Hint: The official FPL API returned “forbidden” for this server. That often happens from cloud datacenters (e.g. Vercel). Try again later, deploy from another region, or set FPL_FETCH_USER_AGENT in the server env to a current desktop Chrome user-agent string.

plannerIndex.title: Squad planner
plannerIndex.description: Enter your FPL Entry ID to work with your team in the planner. Each browser and each Vercel URL keeps its own copy — re-enter on a new link if Planner looked missing.

miniIndex.title: Pick 5 — live leaderboard
miniIndex.description: Five-player squads with FPL scoring. Submit with your Entry ID before the official deadline; your latest squad counts. Captain doubles (vice if captain blanks), max 2 per club.

playHub.title: Mini games
playHub.description: Quick five-player fantasy games — pick your squad, set captain, and climb the leaderboard.
playHub.miniFplBody: Premier League players, FPL gameweek deadlines, official GW points.
playHub.miniWcBody: World Cup squad pool, matchday deadlines, live tournament scoring.

wcMiniIndex.title: Pick 5 — World Cup edition
wcMiniIndex.description: Five World Cup fantasy players per matchday. Choose a unique tag, submit before the deadline, and track live tournament points.

wcMini.statusClosed: Submissions closed · live scores for MD{md}
wcMini.rulesShort: 5 players: 1 GK, 4 outfield (max 2 DEF / MID / FWD each), max 2 from one nation. Goals, assists, clean sheets + captain rules.
wcMini.pitchHint: Tap a card on the pitch to pick a player.
wcMini.gkSlotOnly: This slot is for a goalkeeper only.
wcMini.outfieldNoGk: Goalkeepers must be picked in the GK slot.
wcMini.needFivePlayers: Pick all 5 players on the pitch first.
wcMini.squadIncomplete: Complete your squad and set captain & vice-captain.
wcMini.submitLocked: Fill all 5 slots, set C and VC, then submit.
wcMini.confirmBody: Your latest squad will count for this matchday. Submit now?
wcMini.invalidEntry: Enter a tag (2–40 letters, numbers, _ or -).
wcMini.submissionsClosed: Submissions are closed for this matchday.
wcMini.submitOk: Squad saved. Last submission before the deadline counts.
wcMini.leaderboardNextMd: New squads are being collected for MD{md}; points appear here once that matchday is live.
wcMini.noEntries: No squads yet for this matchday.

mini.statusClosed: Submissions closed · live scores for GW{gw}
mini.rulesShort: 5 players: 1 GK, 4 outfield (max 2 DEF / MID / FWD each), max 2 from one club. FPL points + captain rules.
mini.pitchHint: Tap a card on the pitch to pick a player.
mini.gkSlotOnly: This slot is for a goalkeeper only.
mini.outfieldNoGk: Goalkeepers must be picked in the GK slot.
mini.needFivePlayers: Pick all 5 players on the pitch first.
mini.squadIncomplete: Complete your squad and set captain & vice-captain.
mini.submitLocked: Fill all 5 slots, set C and VC, then submit.
mini.confirmBody: Your latest squad will count for this gameweek. Submit now?
mini.invalidEntry: Enter a valid numeric Entry ID.
mini.submissionsClosed: Submissions are closed for this gameweek.
mini.submitOk: Squad saved. Last submission before the deadline counts.
mini.leaderboardNextGw: New squads are being collected for GW{gw}; points appear here once that gameweek is live.
mini.noEntries: No squads yet for this gameweek.

worldcupIndex.title: World Cup fantasy hub
worldcupIndex.description: Projected fixture difficulty, expected points, and hidden-gem scouting for the group stage. Stats blend FPL season data where linked; FDR and xP are FALEAGUE models — not official FIFA scoring.

worldcup.fdrSummary: Green = easier attack matchups. Tap a team on mobile for MD1–3 opponents.
worldcup.fdrDetail: FDR uses quintiles across all group-stage fixtures (1 = easiest). Desktop shows the full grid.
worldcup.xpSummary: Expected fantasy points for remaining group matchdays. Tap a player for per-MD breakdown.
worldcup.xpDetail: Totals sum upcoming fixtures only once a matchday is complete. Uses FIFA tournament stats when available, FDR, price, and ownership.
worldcup.scoutingSummary: Low-owned picks with strong projected xP in remaining group fixtures. Tap a card for club and season stats.
worldcup.scoutingDetail: Gem score blends remaining xP, FIFA % selected, and value. Uses WC tournament form from FIFA fantasy when synced. EPL-linked and spotlight-club players are excluded.
worldcup.scoutingMeta: Scanned {scanned} players · {spotlight} removed (EPL / spotlight clubs) · {popular} removed (high template %)
worldcup.scoutHiddenKillerHint: Forwards with upside and low template ownership.
worldcup.scoutUnsungHeroHint: Midfielders blending xA, form, and fixture relief.
worldcup.scoutSilentWallHint: Defenders with kind fixtures and under-the-radar profiles.
worldcup.scoutIndestructibleGateHint: Goalkeepers with stable fixture paths and differential pick rates.
worldcup.scoutEmpty: No gems in this bucket with current filters.
worldcup.matchesSummary: Fixtures, live scores, and goal scorers with assists. Tap a match for details; finished games include a text summary with listen-aloud.
worldcup.matchesDetail: Schedule, scores, and scorers sync from FIFA fantasy public feeds. Match summaries are generated from official FIFA data; listen-aloud uses Gemini neural voices (cached) with browser fallback.
worldcup.matchesDisclaimer: Match data from FIFA fantasy public feeds. Not an official FIFA or Opta product.
worldcup.tablesSummary: Standings for all 12 groups with W/D/L and points. Tap a team for results and squad.
worldcup.tablesDetail: Tables update from finished group-stage fixtures when scores sync from FIFA. Top scorers and assists use the World Cup fantasy player pool.
worldcup.tablesDisclaimer: Standings from finished fixtures only; tie-breakers follow FIFA group rules when fully synced.
worldcup.tablesLeaderboardEmpty: No goals or assists recorded yet.
worldcup.tablesSelectTeamHint: Tap a team row to see match results and squad.
worldcup.tablesNoPlayers: No squad data for this team.
worldcup.matchesNoStats: Team stats available after kickoff when configured.
worldcup.matchesPlayerStatsNone: No match stats found for this player.
worldcup.matchesPlayerStatsNotConfigured: Player match stats require API_FOOTBALL_KEY on the server.
worldcup.articlesPageDescription: AI-written previews and post-match reports from official FIFA data — scores, timelines, group context, and match stats.
worldcup.articlesLinkHint: Long-form previews & reports — try England vs Ghana
worldcup.newsSummary: Opinion pieces, columns, and analysis from outlets worldwide. Tap a headline to read the full article on the publisher’s site.
worldcup.newsDetail: Aggregated from Google News editorial searches (US, UK, EU, Latin America, Asia-Pacific, Africa) plus The Guardian, BBC, Sky Sports, ESPN, and NY Times RSS feeds. Refreshes every 20 minutes. We link out only — we do not republish full articles.
worldcup.newsDisclaimer: Third-party headlines and links only; copyright remains with each publisher.
worldcup.newsEmpty: No articles for this filter. Try another region or turn off “Editorials only”.
worldcup.scoutFifaStats: Season stats from FIFA / FPL where available.
worldcup.radarNote: Radar axes scaled 0–100 relative to all World Cup fantasy players in this app.

auth.signupSubtitle: Save favourites and get a personalised news inbox.
auth.loginSubtitle: Pick up where you left off with your squad and inbox.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

onboarding.title: Personalise your feed
onboarding.subtitle: Tell us what you follow — we will match World Cup and FPL news to your inbox.
onboarding.playerSearch: Search FPL or World Cup players…
onboarding.stepEntryHint: Optional — same Entry ID as the rest of the app.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.subtitle: News matched to your teams and players.
inbox.empty: No notifications yet. Finish onboarding or check back after the next news sync.

account.title: Your account
account.pageThemeHint: Decorate your account with your favourite club or national team colours.

signupPrompt.title: Make this hub yours
signupPrompt.body: Join Faleague in seconds — unlock a football experience built around the teams and players you care about.
signupPrompt.benefit1: Personalised World Cup & FPL news in your inbox
signupPrompt.benefit2: Save Mini squads and track your login streak
signupPrompt.benefit3: Dress the app in your club or national team colours

admin.title: Users
admin.summary: Signed-up users and their onboarding answers.

newsIndex.title: News
newsIndex.summary: Trending global football — transfers, Premier League, leagues, events, and World Cup.

fplHub.title: Fantasy Premier League
fplHub.description: Connect your team, plan transfers, and ask the AI analyst.
fplHub.entryHint: Entry ID from your Points page on fantasy.premierleague.com
fplHub.chatBody: Captaincy, transfers, and squad questions with live FPL data.
fplHub.dashboardBody: Squad snapshot, rank, and gameweek points.
fplHub.plannerBody: Plan transfers and chip strategy across gameweeks.
fplHub.managerBody: Team value, transfers, and season history.
fplHub.playersBody: Search stats, form, and xP for every asset.
fplHub.miniBody: Pick five players for the gameweek.
fplHub.fixturesLinkBody: Full 2026/27 schedule GW1–38 with head-to-head history.
fplHub.fixturesPageDescription: Official Premier League schedule. Tap any fixture for the last five meetings.
fplHub.fixturesHint: FDR from H2H history · tap fixture for last 5 meetings · yellow ring = DGW.
fplHub.fixturesExpandHint: Tap team row to expand fixtures.
fplHub.fixturesH2hEmptyHome: No recent home meetings on record.
fplHub.fixturesH2hEmptyAway: No recent away meetings on record.
